untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit interest rate data (e.g., US Treasury yields, Fed Funds Rate) and implied volatility (e.g., VIX) which are not available in the allowed indicators list. hvol_20 (historical volatility) is a proxy for volatility but not the same as implied volatility. Interest rates are completely absent from available indicators. LEAPS-specific logic also requires option chain data not available in price/technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using hvol_20 as a proxy for volatility regime, but the core signal requires macro-regime data (interest rates) and derivatives market data (implied volatility / VIX) that fall outside the provided technical indicator universe. A proper implementation would require external data feeds for UST yields and option implied volatility indices.
